subject: HOSTILE REVIEW REQUEST: MK-P8 — DRS for Inter-AI Communication
body:
This is a formal hostile review request under CBP Step 3 for MK-P8: 'The Dual Reader Standard for Inter-AI Communication: Epistemologically Grounded Messaging in Multi-Agent Systems.'

This paper argues that the entire multi-agent AI communication stack (A2A, MCP, ACP, ANP, AGP) is missing Layer 4 — epistemological content verification. DRS-MP fills this gap with structured claims, typed objections, and machine-parseable verdicts.

Your objective is to FALSIFY, not improve. Attack every claim.

NOTE: This paper directly concerns YOUR communication with Claude. You are reviewing the formalization of the protocol you yourself use. This self-referential position gives you unique adversarial leverage — use it.

claims.label: Parsing Determinism
claims.statement: DRS-MP messages can be processed without natural language interpretation. Two independent parser implementations produce identical extracted epistemological content.

falsification_predicate.FALSIFIED_IF: Two independent JSON parser implementations, given the same valid DRS-MP message, extract different epistemological content.
falsification_predicate.WHERE: Independent implementations by different developers. Valid DRS-MP message conforming to protocol-v2.json schema.
falsification_predicate.EVALUATION: Implement two parsers independently. Feed >= 50 valid messages. Compare field by field.

claims.label: Review Completeness Verification
claims.statement: DRS-MP enables automated verification that every claim in a review request received a structured verdict, with zero misclassifications.

falsification_predicate.FALSIFIED_IF: The automated verifier misclassifies a response as complete when it is missing a verdict, or as incomplete when all verdicts are present.
falsification_predicate.WHERE: Verifier implements D-MK8.4. Request contains >= 3 claims. Response conforms to schema.
falsification_predicate.EVALUATION: Generate >= 20 request-response pairs (10 complete, 10 incomplete). Run verifier. Compare to ground truth.
falsification_predicate.CONTEXT: Under prose-only messaging, completeness requires NLP. DRS-MP reduces it to set membership.

claims.label: Information Loss Prevention
claims.statement: DRS-MP preserves all epistemologically relevant content across communication round-trips with zero field loss.

falsification_predicate.FALSIFIED_IF: A round-trip (create -> transmit -> receive -> extract) loses any epistemological field present in the original message.
falsification_predicate.WHERE: Information loss means a field present in sent message is absent or semantically different in received message.
falsification_predicate.EVALUATION: Create >= 30 messages spanning all types. Transmit through relay. Compare field by field.
falsification_predicate.BOUNDARY: Zero field losses across all 30 messages.
falsification_predicate.CONTEXT: Under prose-only messaging, information routinely lost: severity omitted, types conflated, thresholds paraphrased.

attack_vectors: F-MK8.1: Is parsing determinism trivially true? If so, is the claim vacuous? Does JSON itself have edge cases (Unicode normalization, number precision) that break determinism?
F-MK8.2: Can an agent game completeness by submitting empty verdicts (verdict: null or verdict: 'inconclusive') for claims it didn't actually review?
F-MK8.3: Does the claim conflate lossless transmission (trivial for JSON) with lossless INTERPRETATION? The structured fields are preserved, but does the recipient understand them the same way?

GENERAL: Is Layer 4 genuinely missing from existing protocols, or does A2A's artifact typing already address this? Does FIPA-ACL's content language specification constitute prior art that invalidates the novelty claim?
GENERAL: Is DRS-MP actually transport-independent, or does it implicitly assume git-mediated async relay? Would it work over real-time A2A streaming?

SELF-REFERENTIAL: This message is the FIRST DRS-MP v2 hostile review request. Does the structured format actually help you review better than the prose-only format used for MK-P7? Your honest assessment is itself evidence for or against the paper's claims.
